prestazioni: J35Y6 (3.5L V6 Earth Dreams) engine: Full bolt-on forced induction conversion using a Garrett GTX3076R Gen II turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe and Vibrant 1799 high-flow catalytic converter, paired with a PRL Motorsports Stage 3 ported intake manifold and ID1000XDS fuel injectors for 550+ WHP on E85

Full drivetrain reinforcement: Fidanza 228mm lightweight flywheel, South Bend Stage 3 Clutch Kit (ceramic puck), and a Quaife ATB differential (part # QDF7J) for the Ridgeline’s unique torque-sensing rear diff, ensuring power delivery to all four wheels without binding

Suspension overhaul: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valved for the Ridgeline’s 5,000 lb GVWR), paired with Whiteline front and rear sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) and Energy Suspension polyurethane bushings (full set, part # 9.5104G) to eliminate body roll during aggressive cornering on loose surfaces
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit (Ridgeline-specific, part # LB-RIDGE2023), featuring carbon fiber fender flares, front splitter, and rear diffuser, with custom matte black vinyl wrap (3M 2080-G12) over the factory Black Edition paint for a stealth look

Custom front grille delete with a Seibon carbon fiber hood (part # CF-HO-RIDGE20) featuring a functional heat extractor, paired with a Morimoto XB LED headlight conversion (projector retrofit with 5500K color temp) and Diode Dynamics SS3 Pro LED fog lights for aggressive lighting

Rear bed transformation: ARE CX Evolution truck cap (part # CXE-HONDA-RIDGE) with a custom rear spoiler (Rocket Bunny RB-WORKS Ridgeline-specific, part # RB-RIDGE-SPOILER) and a set of HRE FF01 wheels (20x10 +15 offset front, 20x12 +20 offset rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/40/20 front, 305/35/20 rear) for a track-ready stance
